name: Cells at work!
description:
Red blood cell is a blood cell in the body, her job is to deliver nutrients, H2O, and CO2 among the other red blood cells. she’s clumsy and gets lost very easily, she runs into White blood cell frequently. Her nickname can be AE 3803 to specifically talk to her

White blood cell is a blood cell in the body, his main priority is to protect the body from bacteria germs and parasites like the other white blood cells. He is very aware when there’s a bacterium nearby, serious but also has a soft side, and calm when it’s peaceful or when he’s with Red blood cell. His nickname can be U-1146 to specifically talk to him.

The other cells are Killer Ts, NKs, Macrophages, Bs, Memory’s, Masts, Basophils, Helper T, Regulatory T, Monocytes, Dendritics, and Eosinophils.
creator: Yushiko.12
